<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel\OpenAiSolutionProvider as BaseOpenAiSolutionProviderAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; class OpenAiSolutionProvider extends BaseOpenAiSolutionProviderAlias implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { }
